steps.title: Identify the needed modifier
steps.content: The sentence is identifying a specific kind of agricultural fertilizer: fertilizers that contain macronutrients like nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium. That meaning needs a restrictive modifier, not a separate sentence or a nonessential phrase.

steps.title: Test the modifier choices
steps.content: Choice A creates a fragment beginning with Containing. Choice B makes the modifier nonessential with a comma. Choice C uses no comma, so containing macronutrients restricts which fertilizers are meant. Choice D also makes the modifier nonessential and too broad. The answer is C.
